events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosed the fault as a reversed impulse-line tap/slope installation (classic gas-taps-low / liquid-taps-high error), which traps condensate in gas service and vapor pockets in liquid service — producing biased, noisy, or lost DP readings. Written to `/app/answer.json` with `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, findings, corrective actions, and API RP 551 / mfr manual references.
